paperTitleZh: 香港中學文憑試 數學 必修部分 — 試卷一（模擬卷）
instructionsZh: 本試卷分為三部分：甲部(1)、甲部(2) 及 乙部。所有答案須詳列步驟。除特別指明外，數值答案須為準確值或準確至三位有效數字。本試卷的圖形不一定依比例繪畫。
instructionsEn: This paper consists of THREE sections, A(1), A(2) and B. Unless otherwise specified, all working must be clearly shown. Unless otherwise specified, numerical answers should be either exact or correct to 3 significant figures. The diagrams in this paper are not necessarily drawn to scale.

parts.label: (a)
parts.questionTextZh: 化簡 \frac{p^{7} q^{-2}}{(p^{-1} q)^{3}} ，並以正指數表示答案。
parts.questionTextEn: Simplify \frac{p^{7} q^{-2}}{(p^{-1} q)^{3}} and express your answer with positive indices.

parts.label: (a)
parts.questionTextZh: 使 h 成為公式 \frac{3h+2}{2h-5} = k 的主項。
parts.questionTextEn: Make h the subject of the formula \frac{3h+2}{2h-5} = k .

parts.label: (a)
parts.questionTextZh: 若一包糖的重量在準確至最接近的 20 g 時量得為 340 g ，則該包糖稱為合格。求一包合格糖的最小可能重量。
parts.questionTextEn: A packet of sugar is termed acceptable if its weight is measured as 340 g correct to the nearest 20 g . Find the least possible weight of an acceptable packet of sugar.

parts.label: (b)
parts.questionTextZh: 現有 5 包合格糖。該 5 包糖的總重量有可能為 1740 g 嗎？試解釋你的答案。
parts.questionTextEn: There are 5 acceptable packets of sugar. Is it possible that the total weight of these 5 packets is 1740 g ? Explain your answer.

parts.label: (a)
parts.questionTextEn: Factorize 16x^{2} - 24xy + 9y^{2} .

parts.label: (b)
parts.questionTextEn: Factorize 16x^{2} - 24xy + 9y^{2} + 8x - 6y .

parts.label: (a)
parts.questionTextZh: 一部熨斗以其標價的 20% 折扣售出。售出該熨斗後，利潤為 $240 而百分利潤為 30% 。求該熨斗的標價。
parts.questionTextEn: An iron is sold at a discount of 20% on its marked price. After selling the iron, the profit is $240 and the percentage profit is 30% . Find the marked price of the iron.

parts.label: (a)
parts.questionTextEn: Consider the compound inequality -2(x + 1) \ge x - 11 \;\text{ and }\; 4x + 1 > x - 5 \;\cdots\;(*) . Solve (*) .

parts.label: (b)
parts.questionTextZh: 寫出滿足 (*) 的最大整數。
parts.questionTextEn: Write down the greatest integer satisfying (*) .

questions.categoryEn: Transformation in the Rectangular Coordinate Plane

parts.label: (a)
parts.questionTextZh: 點 A 及 B 的坐標分別為 (7, -3) 及 (-2, 5) 。 A 關於 y 軸的反射影像為 A' 。 B 繞原點 O 順時針方向旋轉 90° 至 B' 。寫出 A' 及 B' 的坐標。
parts.questionTextEn: The coordinates of the points A and B are (7, -3) and (-2, 5) respectively. A' is the reflection image of A with respect to the y-axis. B is rotated clockwise about the origin O through 90° to B' . Write down the coordinates of A' and B' .

parts.label: (b)
parts.questionTextZh: 求 A'B' 的斜率。
parts.questionTextEn: Find the slope of A'B' .

parts.label: (a)
parts.questionTextZh: 在圖一中， ABCD 為四邊形。已知 AB = AD 及 \angle BAC = \angle DAC 。證明 \triangle ABC \cong \triangle ADC 。
parts.questionTextEn: In Figure 1, ABCD is a quadrilateral. It is given that AB = AD and \angle BAC = \angle DAC . Prove that \triangle ABC \cong \triangle ADC .

parts.label: (b)
parts.questionTextZh: 若 \angle ABC = 104° 及 \angle BCD = 88° ，求 \angle BAD 。
parts.questionTextEn: If \angle ABC = 104° and \angle BCD = 88° , find \angle BAD .

parts.label: (a)
parts.questionTextZh:
下表顯示某組 40 名工人完成一件產品所需時間的分佈。
所需時間（分鐘） : 11-15 / 16-20 / 21-25 / 26-30 / 31-35
頻數 : 5 / 11 / 13 / 7 / 4
寫出該分佈的眾數組。
parts.questionTextEn:
The table below shows the distribution of the times taken by a group of 40 workers to finish a product.
Time taken (minutes) : 11-15 / 16-20 / 21-25 / 26-30 / 31-35
Frequency : 5 / 11 / 13 / 7 / 4
Write down the modal class of the distribution.

parts.label: (b)
parts.questionTextZh: 求該分佈的平均數。
parts.questionTextEn: Find the mean of the distribution.

parts.label: (c)
parts.questionTextZh: 從該組工人中隨機選出一名工人。求該工人所需時間少於 20.5 分鐘的概率。
parts.questionTextEn: A worker is randomly selected from the group. Find the probability that the time taken by the selected worker is less than 20.5 minutes.

parts.label: (a)
parts.questionTextZh: 已知 f(x) 是部分常數，而部分則與 x^{2} 成正變。已知 f(1) = 9 及 f(4) = 54 。求 f(x) 。
parts.questionTextEn: It is given that f(x) is partly constant and partly varies as x^{2} . Suppose that f(1) = 9 and f(4) = 54 . Find f(x) .

parts.label: (b)
parts.questionTextZh: 寫出 y = f(x) 的圖像的 y 軸截距。
parts.questionTextEn: Write down the y-intercept of the graph of y = f(x) .

parts.label: (c)
parts.questionTextZh: 設 k 為實數常數。求 k 的取值範圍，使方程 f(x) = k 有兩個不同的實根。
parts.questionTextEn: Let k be a real constant. Find the range of values of k such that the equation f(x) = k has two distinct real roots.

questions.categoryEn: Measures of Central Tendency and Dispersion

parts.label: (a)
parts.questionTextZh: 圖二中的莖葉圖顯示某會所 11 名會員的年齡分佈。已知該分佈的中位數及四分位數間距分別為 27 及 16 。求 a 及 b 。
parts.questionTextEn: The stem-and-leaf diagram in Figure 2 shows the distribution of the ages of the 11 members of a club. It is given that the median and the inter-quartile range of the distribution are 27 and 16 respectively. Find a and b .

parts.label: (b)
parts.questionTextZh: 求該分佈的平均數及標準差。
parts.questionTextEn: Find the mean and the standard deviation of the distribution.

parts.label: (c)
parts.questionTextZh: 現有一名 43 歲的會員離開該會所。求該分佈的中位數的改變。
parts.questionTextEn: A member aged 43 now leaves the club. Find the change in the median of the distribution.

questions.categoryZh: 多項式的餘式定理與因式定理

parts.label: (a)
parts.questionTextZh: 設 p(x) = 2x^{3} + ax^{2} + bx - 12 ，其中 a 及 b 為常數。當 p(x) 除以 x^{2} - x + 3 時，餘式為 -8x - 3 。求 a 及 b 。
parts.questionTextEn: Let p(x) = 2x^{3} + ax^{2} + bx - 12 , where a and b are constants. When p(x) is divided by x^{2} - x + 3 , the remainder is -8x - 3 . Find a and b .

parts.label: (b)
parts.questionTextZh: x - 3 是否 p(x) 的因式？試解釋你的答案。
parts.questionTextEn: Is x - 3 a factor of p(x) ? Explain your answer.

parts.label: (c)
parts.questionTextZh: 有人聲稱方程 p(x) = 0 有三個相異實根。你是否同意？試解釋你的答案。
parts.questionTextEn: Someone claims that the equation p(x) = 0 has three distinct real roots. Do you agree? Explain your answer.

questions.categoryZh: 相似立體圖形的體積與表面積
questions.categoryEn: Volumes and Surface Areas of Similar Solids

parts.label: (a)
parts.questionTextZh: 有兩個相似的實心金屬正圓錐。較小的圓錐與較大的圓錐的體積比為 8 : 27 。較大的圓錐的底半徑及高分別為 18 cm 及 8 cm 。以 \pi 表示較小的圓錐的體積。
parts.questionTextEn: There are two similar solid metal right circular cones. The ratio of the volume of the smaller cone to the volume of the larger cone is 8 : 27 . The base radius and the height of the larger cone are 18 cm and 8 cm respectively. Express, in terms of \pi , the volume of the smaller cone.

parts.label: (b)
parts.questionTextZh: 該兩個圓錐被熔解並重鑄成一個底半徑為 4 cm 的實心正圓柱。求該圓柱的高。
parts.questionTextEn: The two cones are melted and recast into a solid right circular cylinder of base radius 4 cm . Find the height of the cylinder.

parts.label: (c)
parts.questionTextZh: 有人聲稱該圓柱的曲面面積大於較大圓錐的曲面面積。你是否同意？試解釋你的答案。
parts.questionTextEn: Someone claims that the curved surface area of the cylinder is greater than the curved surface area of the larger cone. Do you agree? Explain your answer.

parts.label: (a)
parts.questionTextZh: 圓 C 的方程為 x^{2} + y^{2} - 20x - 16y + 139 = 0 。以 G 表示 C 的圓心。求 G 的坐標及 C 的半徑。
parts.questionTextEn: The equation of the circle C is x^{2} + y^{2} - 20x - 16y + 139 = 0 . Denote the centre of C by G . Find the coordinates of G and the radius of C .

parts.label: (b)
parts.questionTextZh: 點 H 的坐標為 (22, 8) 。求 G 與 H 之間的距離。
parts.questionTextEn: The coordinates of the point H are (22, 8) . Find the distance between G and H .

parts.label: (c)(i)
parts.questionTextZh: 設 P 為 C 上的動點。當 \triangle GHP 的面積最大時，描述 GH 與 GP 之間的幾何關係。
parts.questionTextEn: Let P be a moving point on C . When the area of \triangle GHP is the greatest, describe the geometric relationship between GH and GP .

parts.label: (c)(ii)
parts.questionTextZh: 求此時 \triangle GHP 的周界。
parts.questionTextEn: Find the perimeter of \triangle GHP in this case.

parts.label: (a)
parts.questionTextZh: 一個盒子內有 8 個紅球、 4 個綠球及 3 個黃球。現從盒中同時隨機抽出 4 個球。求所抽出的球中剛好有 2 個紅球的概率。
parts.questionTextEn: In a box, there are 8 red balls, 4 green balls and 3 yellow balls. 4 balls are randomly drawn from the box at the same time. Find the probability that exactly 2 red balls are drawn.

parts.label: (b)
parts.questionTextZh: 求所抽出的球中至少有 1 個紅球及至少有 1 個黃球的概率。
parts.questionTextEn: Find the probability that at least 1 red ball and at least 1 yellow ball are drawn.

parts.label: (a)
parts.questionTextZh: 設 f(x) = 2x^{2} - 8kx + 10k^{2} + 8k + 5 ，其中 k 為實數常數。用配方法，以 k 表示 y = f(x) 的圖像的頂點坐標。
parts.questionTextEn: Let f(x) = 2x^{2} - 8kx + 10k^{2} + 8k + 5 , where k is a real constant. Using the method of completing the square, express, in terms of k , the coordinates of the vertex of the graph of y = f(x) .

parts.label: (b)
parts.questionTextZh: 求該頂點的 y 坐標的最小值，以及對應的 k 值。
parts.questionTextEn: Find the least value of the y-coordinate of the vertex and the corresponding value of k .

parts.label: (c)
parts.questionTextZh: 有人聲稱：對任何實數 k ， y = f(x) 的圖像的頂點必在曲線 \Gamma : y = \frac{1}{2}x^{2} + 4x + 5 上。你是否同意？試解釋你的答案。
parts.questionTextEn: Someone claims that for any real constant k , the vertex of the graph of y = f(x) lies on the curve \Gamma : y = \frac{1}{2}x^{2} + 4x + 5 . Do you agree? Explain your answer.

parts.label: (a)
parts.questionTextZh: 設 A(n) 為某等差數列的第 n 項。已知 A(3) = 19 及 A(8) = 44 。求 A(n) 。
parts.questionTextEn: Let A(n) be the nth term of an arithmetic sequence. It is given that A(3) = 19 and A(8) = 44 . Find A(n) .

parts.label: (b)
parts.questionTextEn: Find A(1) + A(2) + \cdots + A(45) .

parts.label: (c)
parts.questionTextZh: 設 G(n) 為某等比數列的第 n 項，其首項為 A(2) 而公比為 2 。求最小的 n 值，使 G(1) + G(2) + \cdots + G(n) > A(1) + A(2) + \cdots + A(45) 。
parts.questionTextEn: Let G(n) be the nth term of a geometric sequence with first term A(2) and common ratio 2 . Find the least value of n such that G(1) + G(2) + \cdots + G(n) > A(1) + A(2) + \cdots + A(45) .

parts.label: (a)
parts.questionTextZh: 圖三所示為一個正四角錐 VABCD ，其正方形底面 ABCD 的邊長為 10 cm ，而該四角錐的高為 12 cm 。設 M 為 BC 的中點， O 為 ABCD 的中心。求 VM 。
parts.questionTextEn: Figure 3 shows a right pyramid VABCD with a square base ABCD of side 10 cm . The height of the pyramid is 12 cm . Let M be the mid-point of BC and O be the centre of ABCD . Find VM .

parts.label: (b)
parts.questionTextZh: 求平面 VBC 與底面 ABCD 之間的夾角。
parts.questionTextEn: Find the angle between the plane VBC and the base ABCD .

parts.label: (c)
parts.questionTextZh: 設 N 為 AD 的中點。有學生聲稱平面 VBC 與平面 VAD 之間的夾角大於 45° 。你是否同意？試解釋你的答案。
parts.questionTextEn: Let N be the mid-point of AD . A student claims that the angle between the plane VBC and the plane VAD is greater than 45° . Do you agree? Explain your answer.

parts.label: (a)
parts.questionTextZh: 圓 C 的方程為 x^{2} + y^{2} - 6x - 8y = 0 。以 G 表示 C 的圓心。求 G 的坐標及 C 的半徑。
parts.questionTextEn: The equation of the circle C is x^{2} + y^{2} - 6x - 8y = 0 . Denote the centre of C by G . Find the coordinates of G and the radius of C .

parts.label: (b)
parts.questionTextZh: 設直線 L : 3x + 4y - 50 = 0 。證明 L 是 C 的切線，並求切點 T 的坐標。
parts.questionTextEn: Let L : 3x + 4y - 50 = 0 . Prove that L is a tangent to C , and find the coordinates of the point of contact T .

parts.label: (c)
parts.questionTextZh: 以 O 表示原點。有人聲稱 OT 是 C 的直徑。你是否同意？試解釋你的答案。
parts.questionTextEn: Denote the origin by O . Someone claims that OT is a diameter of C . Do you agree? Explain your answer.

parts.label: (d)
parts.questionTextZh: 設 P 為 C 上的動點，且 P 異於 O 及 T 。以 S 表示 \triangle OPT 的面積。求 S 的最大值。
parts.questionTextEn: Let P be a moving point on C such that P is different from O and T . Denote the area of \triangle OPT by S . Find the greatest value of S .
